pet_notes: Create a compact whole-body chibi human pet inspired by the reference photo: reddish auburn side-swept hair, warm brown eyes, thick brows, light moustache and beard, black shirt, and a small black dangling cross earring on the left ear. Cute friendly Codex desktop companion, readable at 192x208.
style_notes: clean sticker-like chibi mascot, crisp silhouette, expressive but simple, no photorealism, no text, no shadows, no scenery
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `sticker`: Polished sticker mascot with bold clean shapes, crisp outline, flat colors, and minimal highlight detail. User style notes: clean sticker-like chibi mascot, crisp silhouette, expressive but simple, no photorealism, no text, no shadows, no scenery.
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
